selected.brief_rationale: Stale 2014 wills, no trust, $30M+ estate — foundation document needed.
Wills stale, no POAs/HCD/HIPAA, minor child without guardian.
Three children, large estate — start annual exclusion cadence.
ILIT needed before any new estate-liquidity coverage.
Recipient vehicles for GRAT/IDGT remainders; encodes age-35 rule.
Pre-exit business with high appreciation = textbook zeroed-out GRAT.
Sale of non-voting interest to IDGT freezes value; pairs with GRAT.
Use exemption now via SLAT with indirect spousal access.
Allocate GST exemption across children's trusts and IDGT.
Align beneficiary designations with new trust plan.
Kennesaw HQ inside operating LLC — separate before sale.
F-reorg builds Holdco enabling recap and stock-sale flexibility.
Voting/non-voting recap creates clean gift vehicle.
Replace OA to coordinate with buy/sell, recap, post-restructure.
Isolate RE; supports Catherine's post-exit RE vision.
GA PTET captures federal SALT workaround on $3.4M K-1.
Document reasonable comp; optimize W-2/K-1 split.
Catherine $0 earned income; payroll role enables deferrals.
James 16 — eligible for family-business work funding Roth.
Cost seg accelerates depreciation post-RE-separation.
Group RE LLC with op LLC for material participation.
Specialty mechanical w/ controls likely qualifies; never studied.

selected.preliminary_preference_rationale: Cross-purchase preserves basis step-up; cleaner for 2-owner S-Corp.
selected.brief_rationale: Marcus 88%/Derek 12%, no funded buy/sell — material exposure.

selected.preliminary_preference_rationale: Redemption documented as alternative; cross-purchase preferred.
selected.brief_rationale: Alternative buy/sell structure if cross-purchase impractical.
ILIT-owned permanent coverage funds estate liquidity at death.
Group LTD inadequate; layer max-issue individual DI own-occ.
BOE protects business overhead during Marcus's disability.
Derek loss damages transaction value; key-person coverage gap.
$2M umbrella inadequate for $30M+ net worth.
Auto $250K below umbrella attachment — raise underlying.

selected.preliminary_preference_rationale: Hybrid LTC preferred at HNW for asset efficiency.
selected.brief_rationale: Standalone LTC option; hybrid generally preferred for HNW.

selected.preliminary_preference_rationale: Asset-based LTC efficient at HNW; preserves premium if unused.
selected.brief_rationale: Hybrid LTC at 52 captures favorable underwriting.
Data-center mix + controls — $1M cyber materially under-insured.
Continue maxing 401(k) plus catch-up.
Age 52 + high profit = large CB plan deferral shelter.
Cross-tested PS layer concentrates contributions to owners.
Generic plan lacks Roth/cross-tested features; restate via TPA.
W-2 >$145K triggers SECURE 2.0 Roth catch-up requirement.
Backdoor Roth viable for Marcus; Catherine blocked by pro-rata.
Tier business cash for operating/reserve/yield.
Layer personal cash across operating/emergency/investment.
$1.8M taxable + high bracket — direct indexing for TLH alpha.
Locate tax-inefficient assets in qualified accounts.
Discipline for deploying transaction proceeds at scale.
TLH coordination essential at 41% effective rate.
Muni allocation efficient for high-bracket fixed income.
Stay-bonus retains key team through transaction.
Q-of-E required before banker; closes diligence gap.
Sell-side banker engaged T-12 mo to run process.
Fractional CFO closes reporting gap; supports Q-of-E.
Written death/disability/sale playbook absent today.
47% top-3 concentration drags multiple — de-risk first.
Bench depth signals continuity to buyers.
COLI-funded SERP for longer-horizon retention.
Olivia in college + 2 minors — 5-year front-load 529s.
Custodial Roth funded by James's family-business earnings.
Eleanor 78 with no LTC — model future support cost.
Foundation/values vision needs written mission anchor.
Family meeting cadence supports deliberate communication.
Next-gen education aligns with anti-demotivation philosophy.
Pre-liquidity bridge vehicle for hospital + scholarships.
Pre-LOI gift of non-voting interest avoids assignment of income.

supplemental_candidates.reason_supplemental: Rolling GRAT cadence is a refinement after initial GRAT proves out; revisit T-1.
supplemental_candidates.brief_rationale: Layered GRAT program after initial 3-year GRAT establishes rhythm.

supplemental_candidates.reason_supplemental: QPRT possible on Blue Ridge home but not central; advisor judgment.
supplemental_candidates.brief_rationale: Vacation home transfer via QPRT if appreciation expected.

supplemental_candidates.reason_supplemental: FLP for real estate may overlap with Holloway Properties LLC structure.
supplemental_candidates.brief_rationale: FLP discount layer if separate from operating RE LLC.

supplemental_candidates.reason_supplemental: Intra-family loans selectively useful but not central given GRAT/IDGT engine.
supplemental_candidates.brief_rationale: AFR loans selectively useful for liquidity to trusts.

supplemental_candidates.reason_supplemental: CRUT structure plausible for pre-sale gifting; weigh vs DAF + foundation.
supplemental_candidates.brief_rationale: CRUT splits remainder to charity with grantor income stream.

supplemental_candidates.reason_supplemental: Augusta Rule available if home meetings documented; small benefit.
supplemental_candidates.brief_rationale: §280A(g) home rental for 14 documented business days.

supplemental_candidates.reason_supplemental: S-Corp ineligible absent C-Corp conversion; not pursued absent strategic need.
Withholding alignment after PTET/CB plan changes; routine.
supplemental_candidates.brief_rationale: Re-tune withholding once tax structure changes implemented.

supplemental_candidates.reason_supplemental: FR notes no scheduled valuables; only review needed.
supplemental_candidates.brief_rationale: Verify no scheduled items needed; low priority.

supplemental_candidates.reason_supplemental: Treasury Direct may not fit PSA-managed approach; evaluate separately.
supplemental_candidates.brief_rationale: Direct treasuries an option for excess operating cash yield.

speculative_dropped.drop_reason: No crypto holdings indicated in ClientProfile.
GA resident; no high-tax-state nexus warranting NING/DING.
No cross-border facts; client is US citizen GA resident.
ESOP not aligned with stated strategic-sale preference.
Profits interest restricted to LLC tax classification; HIS is S-Corp.
PPLI is post-liquidity tool; not appropriate pre-exit.
No outside board service indicated for Marcus.
No adult children marrying; Olivia 19 in college.
